content.fact_text: Implementation of a robust, production-ready Kafka producer client providing atomic and fault-tolerant event publication.

provenance_data.behaviour: Establishes a fault-tolerant Kafka producer client using kafkajs, utilizing Opossum for circuit breaking and Zod for configuration validation. Ensures 'acks: all' for data durability.
interfaces: publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any, headers?: Record<string, any>): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, fault-tolerant interface for publishing domain events, ensuring ACID-compliant message persistence via Kafka and observability through structured logging and circuit breakers.
